zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Saint-Omer於1105年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫時，她的父親Guillaume de Saint-Omer21歲，母親Melisende Picquigny30歲。她於1134年與Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1145年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde de Saint-Omer于1105年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫时，她的父亲Guillaume de Saint-Omer21岁，母亲Melisende Picquigny30岁。她于1134年与Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1145年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mechtilde
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Saint-Omer was born in 1105, in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Guillaume de Saint-Omer, was 21 and her mother, Melisende Picquigny, was 30. She married Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand in 1134, in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She died after 1145.

Elle a épousé Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand en 1134, à Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée après 1145.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Saint-Omerが1105年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-オマーで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Saint-Omerは21歳，母Melisende Picquignyは30歳であった。1134年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-オマーでArnould de Guisnes I Comte Gandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1145年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Saint-Omer(이)가 1105년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume de Saint-Omer(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Melisende Picquigny(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1134년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-머에서 Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1145년 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Saint-Omer родилась в 1105 г. в местности сеинт-омир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume de Saint-Omer было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Melisende Picquigny, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand в 1134 г. в местности сеинт-омир, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла после 1145 г.
